name: design-spec-plugin
description: A local Codex plugin that encodes a complete SaaS design spec and page rules for future UI generation.

interface.shortDescription: Generate enterprise SaaS interfaces from a local spec.
interface.longDescription: A local plugin that packages a complete SaaS design specification, component constraints, and page archetypes so Codex can generate polished enterprise platform screens with stable visual and structural consistency.
defaultPrompt: Create a workplace dashboard for a SaaS platform.
Review this admin UI against my SaaS design spec.
Turn this feature brief into a polished SaaS page.
